title: $GAIJI
text: $GAIJI Allow the use of Japanese Gaiji characters. $GAIJI { = } 1 | 0 Arguments 1 —Japanese Gaiji characters are enabled. The Unicode private area E000–F8FF is not available for other purposes, because it is used for mapping the Gaiji characters. 0 —Gaiji characters are disabled but the Unicode private area E000–F8FF is available. Defaults Assignment file: Client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 1 Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
